author: tcuisset
body:
#### PR description:

CaloTruthAccumulator is updated to produce multiple SimCluster collections, to simplify the validation code and allow easier interpretation of simulation truth. The collections produced are:
 - CaloParticle collection (same as before)
 - SimCluster "CaloParticle" collection (same thing but in SimCluster dataformat, simplifies consumers to avoid a lof of if/else)
 - SimCluster "legacy" collection (identical behaviour as SimCluster before this commit, with the same empty label as before. Not really recommended to be used, but kept for compatibility)
 - SimCluster "boundary" collection : creates a SimCluster for every SimTrack crossing calorimeter boundary (and having cumulative simhits from itself or its simtrack descendents). Can be used in replacement of "legacy" collection (the only difference is for primary photons that do not convert before boundary).
 - SimCluster "merged" collection : merges very collimated SimTrack into one SimCluster (only from same CaloParticle). For now it uses fastjet anti-kt with very small distance parameter (0.05), at least until a better merging algorithm is implemented. 
 
 It also produces RefVector to map SimCluster to CaloParticle.
 
 This PR only contains the change in CaloTruthAccumulator. Another PR will follow with the TICL validation changes to use the new SimClusters. 

Documentation
[Slides at TICL meeting](https://indico.cern.ch/event/1639374/sessions/645064/attachments/3205252/5707246/Simulation%20truth%20-%20TICL%20January21.pdf)
[Slide 7 of HGCAL presentation at NGT MC truth workshop](https://indico.cern.ch/event/1608483/contributions/6865187/attachments/3230254/5757902/26_03_03_truthHGCAL.pdf)

#### PR validation:
Ran usual PR tests, and tested with an updated TICL validation (to be submitted to a future PR)
No changes in physics are expected from this PR, since the new collections are not used (for now).
title: Produce multiple SimCluster collections in CaloTruthAccumulator
